field_values.action_summary: Dorothy and Toto, accompanied by the Scarecrow, navigate the forest in search of basic necessities like food and water.
field_values.camera_intent: Wide shots of forest environment; Medium tracking shots of trio walking; Close-ups on fatigue and searching eyes
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Cumulative dirt/exhaustion levels on dorothy and the_scarecrow
Constant proximity of toto to dorothy
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH005_SC001

## Production Intent
Establish the physical toll of travel through a forest environment. The sequence must visually communicate the transition from post-waking disorientation to a weary, survival-driven determination as characters search for sustenance.

## Required Cast
- dorothy (weary traveler, white dress/clothing)
- toto (dog, proximal to dorothy)
- the_scarecrow (companion)

## Required Environments
- forest_and_cottage_setting (including small cottage and clear water spring)

## Continuity Constraints
- Cumulative dirt/exhaustion levels on dorothy and the_scarecrow
- Constant proximity of toto to dorothy

## Beat List
- BT001: Post-waking disorientation in the forest
- BT002: The search for necessities
- BT003: Weary determination in movement
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
